projectDescription: A fun, interactive purity test web app for San Jose State University students to track and share their campus experiences.
keyFeatures: 100-question SJSU-specific purity test with campus life scenarios
Real-time purity score calculation (higher score = more pure)
Community statistics page showing how all test-takers answered each question
Shareable results with clipboard copy functionality
Responsive Next.js frontend with retro serif typography
publicApiSurface: POST /api/submit — Saves a test result (score + answers array) to MongoDB
GET /api/stats — Returns total tests, average score, and per-question answer statistics
